name: stackra/webhook
purpose: Outbound webhook substrate — WebhookSubscription + WebhookDelivery aggregates with HMAC-SHA256 signing, rotation grace, Bus::batch fan-out, and 4 destinations.
capabilities: HMAC-SHA256 signing with rotation-grace dual signatures
Bus::batch fan-out with static + retry-after-aware backoff
when_to_use: Publishing Stackra domain events out to a tenant's external endpoint with reliable delivery and signing.
when_not_to_use: For inbound third-party integrations (OAuth, sync), use the sibling stackra/integrations package.
